title: Beneath the Reef of Glass
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A xenobiologist on an Orison ocean moon must stop a human mining claim from erasing a living memory reef.
long_description: On Pelagos, an ocean moon in the Orison Shoals, a human mining company claims that a pale reef beneath the glass ice is dormant mineral architecture. Xenobiologist Mira Cael arrives to audit the claim and finds that the reef is not a settlement, grave, or archive in human terms, but a living continuity ecology that preserves Orison ancestral memory. As Olan Drex pushes extraction under lawful but dangerously narrow categories, Mira and the Orison diplomat Keeps-Water-Calm must build a way for human law to recognize memory as sovereignty before the reef is cut apart. The manuscript is complete as a validated TXT draft, with a cover asset and EPUB export available.
